summary: Completed testing of Grounds of Merit feature. Backend API endpoints are mostly functional (93% success rate) with CRUD operations working correctly. Critical AI integration issues identified that prevent full functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when attempting AI auto-identification
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core AI functionality for automatically identifying grounds of merit
critical_bugs.error_details: LiteLLM completion() model= gpt-5.2 call fails, likely due to API key or model configuration issues

critical_bugs.issue: PydanticSerializationError: Unable to serialize unknown type: <class 'bson.objectid.ObjectId'>
critical_bugs.impact: Potential JSON serialization failures when MongoDB ObjectIDs are present
critical_bugs.error_details: MongoDB ObjectIDs cannot be serialized to JSON - should use UUIDs instead

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: Incorrect HTTP status code for resource creation

authentication_issues.issue: Cannot access case detail pages without proper OAuth authentication
authentication_issues.impact: Prevents testing of Grounds of Merit UI components
authentication_issues.details: Session cookie approach failed, requires proper Google OAuth flow

ui_accessibility.issue: Unable to verify Grounds tab functionality due to authentication barrier
ui_accessibility.impact: Cannot test UI interactions, button clicks, or form submissions

passed_tests: Create Ground Manually (with minor status code issue)

critical_fixes: Fix AI auto-identify endpoint - check EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configuration and GPT-5.2 model availability
Resolve MongoDB ObjectID serialization issues - ensure all models use UUIDs instead of ObjectIDs
Implement proper authentication flow or test user bypass for UI testing
verification_needed: Verify EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is valid and has access to GPT-5.2 model
Test AI investigate endpoint functionality after fixing auto-identify
Ensure all database models use UUID fields instead of MongoDB ObjectIDs
